docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FRANCIS MALLON. DEFENDANT HILLCREST DECOR DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLON, FRANCIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILLCREST DECOR $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY MALLON, FRANCIS AS TO DEFENDANT HILLCREST DECOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2019 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
